title: Mandrake, the Magician
writer: Joseph F. Poland, Basil Dickey, Ned Dandy
actors: Warren Hull, Doris Weston, Al Kikume
plot: Mandrake and his assistant Lothar are working the cruise lines and make the acquaintance of Professor Houston who has developed a radium energy machine, which is much coveted by a masked Crime Lord known as "The Wasp".
